memoryArtifacts.headline:
Elizabeth Frost Whale
(24 March 1587 – 20 June 1647)
memoryArtifacts.description:
The birth date above was her baptism date. 

She was born at Glemsford, Suffolk, England and baptised at St. Mary the Virgin Church there on March 24,1587/8. 

The family later moved to nearby Stanste …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Frost於1588年3月24日在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德受洗時，她的父親Edward Frost11585歲，母親Thomasine Belgrave27歲。她於1605年11月12日與Henry Rice在英國素福爾可斯坦斯亞德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1621年住在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德且於1622年住在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。她去世於1647年6月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利享年59歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Frost于1588年3月24日在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德受洗时，她的父亲Edward Frost11585岁，母亲Thomasine Belgrave27岁。她于1605年11月12日与Henry Rice在英国素福爾可斯坦斯亞德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1621年住在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德且于1622年住在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。她去世于1647年6月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利享年59岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可素德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Frost was christened on 24 March 1588, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, her father, Edward Frost, was 11585 and her mother, Thomasine Belgrave, was 27. She married Henry Rice on 12 November 1605, in Stanstead, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom in 1621 and Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom in 1622. She died on 20 June 1647, in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59, and was buried in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Frost a été baptisée le 24 mars 1588, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edward Frost, avait 11585 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Belgrave, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Rice le 12 novembre 1605, à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1621 et à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1622. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1647, à Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Frost am 24. März 1588 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Frost 11585 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Belgrave 27. Sie hat am 12. November 1605 in Stanstead, Suffolk, England Henry Rice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1621 hat sie in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und 1622 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1647 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Frost è stato battezzato il 24 marzo 1588 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Edward Frost, aveva 11585 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Belgrave, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Henry Rice il 12 novembre 1605, nel Stanstead, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1621 e nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1622. Morì il 20 giugno 1647, nel Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frostが1588年3月24日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで洗礼を受けた時，父Edward Frostは11585歳，母Thomasine Belgraveは27歳であった。1605年11月12日にイギリススフォルクスタンステアドでHenry Riceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1621年にはイギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドに，1622年にはイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズに住んでいた。彼女は1647年6月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリーで59歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이
ko.Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frost(이)가 1588년 3월 24일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Frost(은)는 11585세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Belgrave(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1605년 11월 12일 영국 수폴크 스탠스테아드에서 Henry Rice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1621년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에서, 1622년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 살았다. 그녀는 1647년 6월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.24 March 1587/88–20 June 1647: 24 de março de 1588–20 de junho de 1647
pt.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
pt.Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, Engl: Great Berkhampstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Frost foi batizada em 24 de março de 1588, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Frost, tinha 11585 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Belgrave, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Rice em 12 de novembro de 1605, em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1621 e em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1622. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1647, em Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Frost была крещена 24 марта 1588 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Frost было 11585 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Belgrave, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Rice 12 ноября 1605 г. в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1621 году и в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1622 году. Она умерла 20 июня 1647 г. в местности судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности судбури, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Frost se bautizó el 24 de marzo de 1588, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Frost, tenía 11585 años y su mamá, Thomasine Belgrave, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Henry Rice el 12 de noviembre de 1605, en Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1621 y en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1622. Murió el 20 de junio de 1647, en Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
